title: RegressionPolicy
description: Governed regression policy defining thresholds, hard-fail dimensions, and scope for regression checks.

policy_id.description: Unique regression policy identifier with explicit namespace and semantic version suffix.

description.description: Human-readable description of the policy's purpose and scope.

thresholds.description: Maximum allowed drops per dimension before a regression is triggered.

structural_score_drop_max.description: Maximum allowable drop in structural score (0.0–1.0).

semantic_score_drop_max.description: Maximum allowable drop in semantic score (0.0–1.0).

grounding_score_drop_max.description: Maximum allowable drop in grounding score (0.0–1.0).

latency_increase_pct_max.description: Maximum allowable latency increase as a percentage of baseline (e.g. 20 = 20%).

human_disagreement_increase_pct_max.description: Maximum allowable increase in human disagreement rate as a percentage of baseline.

hard_fail_dimensions.description: Which dimensions trigger a hard failure (vs. warning) when their threshold is exceeded.

structural_score.description: When true, a structural score regression beyond threshold is a hard failure.

semantic_score.description: When true, a semantic score regression beyond threshold is a hard failure.

grounding_score.description: When true, a grounding score regression beyond threshold is a hard failure.

latency.description: When true, a latency regression beyond threshold is a hard failure.

human_disagreement.description: When true, a human disagreement regression beyond threshold is a hard failure.

minimum_sample_sizes.description: Minimum required sample sizes for valid regression comparison.

cases.description: Minimum number of cases required for a valid aggregate comparison.

per_pass_records.description: Minimum number of records per pass type for pass-level attribution.

scope.description: Artifact types and pass types in scope for this policy.

artifact_types.description: Artifact types included in regression scope.

pass_types.description: Pass types included in regression scope.

deterministic_required.description: When true, a non-deterministic candidate run is a hard failure.
